ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the data point */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data point */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of data point (e.g., question, answer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data point */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the categories table */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the topics table */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_keywords FOREIGN KEY ("keywords") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword_name" TEXT /* Name of the keyword */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the keyword */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the keyword was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the keyword was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the answer belongs to */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Text of the answer */,
  "answer_date" TEXT /* Date the answer was provided */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the answer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the answer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accepted_answers" (
  "accepted_answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accepted answer */,
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the answer that was accepted */,
  "accepted_date" TEXT /* Date the answer was accepted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the accepted answer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the accepted answer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accepted_answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accepted_answers_answer_id FOREIGN KEY ("answer_id") REFERENCES answers ("answer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_date" TEXT /* Date the question was asked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_times" (
  "response_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response time */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response time belongs to */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time it took to respond to the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response time was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response time was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_times_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creation_dates" (
  "creation_date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each creation date */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the creation date belongs to */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the data point was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the creation date was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the creation date was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creation_date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_creation_dates_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points_sources" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
